questions.question: Какие 4 типа метрик в Flink и когда какой используется?

options.text: Counter (monotonic accumulated, records/errors processed), Gauge (instantaneous value, queue depth/cache size/memory), Meter (events per second, rate measurement), Histogram (distribution с percentiles, latency/sizes). В большинстве случаев — Counter + Gauge достаточно; rate вычисляется в Prometheus query (rate(counter[1m])). Histogram для latency P50/P95/P99

questions.explanation: Counter — monotonic int (errors, processedRecords). Gauge — lambda evaluated на scrape (cacheSize, memoryUsed). Meter — wrapper для rate (но Prometheus computes rate из counter, Meter redundant обычно). Histogram — percentiles distribution с reservoir (SlidingTimeWindowReservoir для sharp window). Production rule: Counter для накопления, Gauge для текущего value, Histogram для latency distribution. Meter избегайте — лучше Counter + Prometheus rate().

questions.question: Какие 12 (top) встроенных метрик критичны для production Flink dashboards?

options.text: Checkpoint duration P95, state size trend, numberOfFailedCheckpoints, currentInputWatermark lag, busyTime% per operator, backPressuredTime% per operator, numRecordsInPerSecond throughput, numLateRecordsDropped, GC time/minute, Heap usage %, Direct memory used, RocksDB compaction pending bytes

questions.explanation: Top 12 покрывают main production failure modes. Alert thresholds: Checkpoint duration > timeout/2 (warning); FailedCheckpoints > 0 в 10min (critical); Watermark lag > 5min (high); backPressuredTime > 800ms/sec sustained 5min (high); numLateRecordsDropped > 0 (high if не side output); GC time > 10s/min G1 / > 3s/min ZGC (medium); Heap > 90% sustained (warning); Direct memory linear growth (leak); RocksDB compaction-pending-bytes растёт линейно (write stall coming). Включить RocksDB metrics via config (не enabled by default).

questions.question: Production: user metrics design для fraud detection job. Что НЕ делать и какие cardinality pitfalls избегать?

options.text: АНТИПАТТЕРН: getMetricGroup().addGroup('user', userId).counter('events') — millions cardinality убивает Prometheus. Правильно: Counter fraudDetected (aggregate), Histogram detectionLatencyMs (distribution), Gauge<Long> activeWatchedUsers (для capacity). Top-N tracking для hot users, не per-entity labels. Per-key labels (userId, sessionId, txn_id) — cardinality explosion. Aggregate metrics + sliding window top-N
Метрики не нужны если есть logs

questions.explanation: Cardinality — главная проблема Prometheus + Flink в large clusters. Per-userId/sessionId labels могут привести к miллионам unique time series → Prometheus dies. Pattern fix: aggregate metrics (counter per category, sum by tags), top-N detail tracking (HyperLogLog для approximation, or explicit top-K data structure), histogram для percentile distributions (без per-entity). Production rule: cardinality labels должны быть bounded и known (e.g., status, category, severity — 5-20 values acceptable). Unbounded labels — анти-паттерн.

questions.question: Default Dropwizard Histogram reservoir (ExponentiallyDecayingReservoir) — proper choice для production latency P99 tracking за конкретное окно (e.g., last 1 minute).
questions.explanation: False. Default ExponentiallyDecayingReservoir biased для recent samples, но не sharp window — старые samples оставляют 'tail' влияние. Для P99 'за last 1 minute' нужен SlidingTimeWindowReservoir(60, TimeUnit.SECONDS) — sharp cutoff. Construct: new com.codahale.metrics.Histogram(new SlidingTimeWindowReservoir(60, TimeUnit.SECONDS)). Это важно для alerting: 'P99 latency > 100ms за last minute' требует точного окна, не decaying. Default OK для general distribution view, но не для time-bound alerts.
